_comment: OpenClaw cron job registry. This file is the canonical source of truth for all scheduled pipeline tasks. Install with: crontab -e, then copy the crontab entries from CRON.md. Never add --execute to budget_executor.py without explicit human approval.

jobs.description: Fetch ParkingBreaker telemetry from Railway and write delta snapshot. HEARTBEAT.md reads this output — it must run BEFORE any heartbeat turn.
Finance threshold alert: Stripe < $50, Lob < $15. Offsets 2h from observer so it runs after a fresh snapshot is available.
jobs.schedule_human: Every 4 hours at :00, offset by 2h from observer (02:00, 06:00, 10:00, 14:00, 18:00, 22:00)

jobs.description: Daily AD-OPS dry-run. Evaluates Reddit budget recommendations but NEVER executes. Output is reviewed by heartbeat. To promote to live execution, explicit human approval is required — change --dry-run to --execute only after Telegram confirmation.
jobs.safety_rule: NEVER change --dry-run to --execute without explicit human approval via Telegram.

jobs.description: Monthly compute gate sweep across all active cities in triple_layer_roster.json. Calls process_city_for_export() fresh on every city. Reports ready/review/blocked/errors counts. Runs at 3am on the 1st to avoid overlap with other jobs.
